response_raw: {"mode":"human","topic":"How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.","opinion":"As a carpenter in New York juggling self-employment alongside family, navigating the digital world feels like balancing tools—some useful, others misleading. Fake content is akin to warped wood; recognizing its flaws requires keen eye. Start by cross-checking sources as you would verify timber’s authenticity. Follow trusted experts and fact-checking platforms much like I'd consult blueprints before cutting a shelf. Curate feeds with intention: favor creators who mirror your values—much like selecting finishes that enhance my work. Engage critically, question anomalies, and share verifiable truths. Just as I foster honest craftsmanship, advocate for media integrity by amplifying credible voices. Knowledge is the measure against which to test authenticity, ensuring both my craft and informed community.","reasoning_summary":"Cross-referencing source credibility parallels carpentry material checks. Curating trustworthy content aligns with selecting quality materials. Advocacy for verified information mirrors promoting honesty in trade. Connecting personal discipline in craftsmanship to media consumption ethics reinforces structured, intentional interaction online.","tone":"informative","citations":["Poynter", "Snell School of Journalism"],"safety_notes":"None","used_persona_fields":["occupation","city_of_living"]}

response_parsed.topic: How to manage and dealing with fake content on social media.
response_parsed.opinion: As a carpenter in New York juggling self-employment alongside family, navigating the digital world feels like balancing tools—some useful, others misleading. Fake content is akin to warped wood; recognizing its flaws requires keen eye. Start by cross-checking sources as you would verify timber’s authenticity. Follow trusted experts and fact-checking platforms much like I'd consult blueprints before cutting a shelf. Curate feeds with intention: favor creators who mirror your values—much like selecting finishes that enhance my work. Engage critically, question anomalies, and share verifiable truths. Just as I foster honest craftsmanship, advocate for media integrity by amplifying credible voices. Knowledge is the measure against which to test authenticity, ensuring both my craft and informed community.
response_parsed.reasoning_summary: Cross-referencing source credibility parallels carpentry material checks. Curating trustworthy content aligns with selecting quality materials. Advocacy for verified information mirrors promoting honesty in trade. Connecting personal discipline in craftsmanship to media consumption ethics reinforces structured, intentional interaction online.
